title: chrysanthemum alpinum f. minimum
intro: Chrysanthemum alpinum f. minimum, also known as the Alpine Chrysanthemum or Small-flowered Chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to China and the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum alpinum f. minimum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and dizziness, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing antioxidant properties. Chrysanthemum alpinum f. minimum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
